name: Animal Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not grease cookie sheet.
2. Grind 1/2 cup oatmeal in blender until fine.
3. Add honey, salt, flour, and baking soda to the oatmeal.
4. Cut in butter until the mixture is crumbly.
5. Stir in buttermilk until a dough forms.
6. Roll out the dough very thin and cut with animal cookie cutters.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes, or until brown.
8. Bake leftover pieces as well.
